def negative_monolithic_module():
    rule_id = "monolithic_module"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Non-__init__.py modules that are unusually large and combine many imports with orchestration-heavy behavior."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
